name: GSAP + ScrollTrigger — Scroll Timelines
description: Industry-standard animation engine with ScrollTrigger for scrub, pin, and parallax. Auto-applies stagger reveals to sections and parallax to hero images.
body:
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.7/dist/gsap.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3.12.7/dist/ScrollTrigger.min.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger);
    // Sync with Lenis if present
    if (window.__lenis) {
      window.__lenis.on('scroll', ScrollTrigger.update);
      gsap.ticker.lagSmoothing(0);
    }
    // Stagger reveal for sections
    gsap.utils.toArray('[data-gsap-reveal]').forEach(function(el) {
      gsap.from(el, { opacity: 0, y: 50, duration: 0.9, ease: 'power3.out',
        scrollTrigger: { trigger: el, start: 'top 88%', toggleActions: 'play none none none' } });
    });
    // Parallax on hero/feature images
    gsap.utils.toArray('[data-gsap-parallax]').forEach(function(el) {
      var speed = parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-gsap-parallax') || '0.3');
      gsap.to(el, { yPercent: speed * 100, ease: 'none',
        scrollTrigger: { trigger: el.closest('section') || el, start: 'top bottom', end: 'bottom top', scrub: true } });
    });
  });
</script>
